description_long: This is an electric guitar with a solid body featuring a striking red and black color scheme. The body has an angular, modern design with a single cutaway for easier access to the higher frets. The front displays a dark pickguard, visible pickups, and a circular metallic bridge area, while the neck is a natural wood tone with a rosewood or similar fingerboard and dot inlays. The headstock is triangular with six tuning pegs arranged in a 3+3 configuration. The back of the guitar is mostly red with bold black geometric patterns, and the overall finish is glossy, highlighting the wood grain and painted surfaces. The instrument appears robust and suitable for urban street performances or display in a music shop.
description: A modern, angular electric guitar with a red and black body, natural wood neck, and glossy finish. Features include a dark pickguard, metallic bridge, and a triangular headstock with six tuning pegs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red and black body, dark pickguard, pickups, circular bridge, and the full length of the neck and headstock.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the guitar's slim profile, the thickness of the body, and the protruding bridge and hardware.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the bold black geometric patterns on the red body and the back of the neck and headstock.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting the guitar's thinness and the edge of the pickguard and hardware.
attribute_headstock_design: Triangular headstock with 3+3 tuning peg arrangement, no visible logo, and simple contours.
